metadata.author: Sana Asif Ahmad
metadata.description: Reference for how AI 'risk' is classified — the EU AI Act baseline taxonomy, the sectors Global South countries commonly elevate to high-risk, and each tracked country's own high-risk list. Built to be consistent with data/countries.json and data/frameworks.json.
sources: National AI strategies and draft legislation of tracked countries

reference_taxonomy.source: Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 laying down harmonised rules on artificial intelligence
reference_taxonomy.approach: Risk-based: every AI system is sorted into one of four tiers, each with different obligations.

examples: Real-time biometric ID in public spaces

tiers.obligation: Conformity assessment, risk management, human oversight, transparency before market.

global_south_divergences.rationale: Agriculture underpins food security and rural livelihoods; failures carry outsized social cost.

global_south_divergences.eu_treatment: credit scoring is high-risk; broader mobile-money use is not singled out
global_south_divergences.rationale: Mobile money is core financial infrastructure for the unbanked.
Social platforms shape public discourse and election integrity.

global_south_divergences.eu_treatment: covered only generally under critical infrastructure / safety
global_south_divergences.rationale: Worker-safety and economic dependence on extractive sectors.
Flood/climate forecasting is life-saving in exposed economies.

global_south_divergences.eu_treatment: migration/biometric ID is high-risk under Annex III
global_south_divergences.rationale: Migration dynamics and national ID systems are politically central.

country_risk_profiles.divergence_notes: Agricultural AI considered critical infrastructure, not in EU high-risk list
Adds environmental impact as consideration for high-risk classification
Mobile money and agricultural AI prioritized as high-risk given economic importance
Content moderation AI prioritized due to social media's role in society
Oil and gas AI considered critical infrastructure; electoral AI top priority post-2023 elections
Border/migration AI highly prioritized given US-Mexico dynamics
Mining sector AI classified as high-risk due to safety implications; credit scoring prioritized for inclusion
Garment sector AI prioritized given economic importance; climate AI considered critical
